programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: Senior vet Tim tutors new recruit Phil through an injured koala checkup; the team's solutions for animals plagued by the summer heat; vet Karina solves a puzzling frog case and releases an old friend who's ready to fly.

programme.title: The Hippo Supremacy
programme.desc: Zambia's Luangwa River hippos are living the easy life, or so it seems. They are one of the heaviest creatures on Earth, and life fluctuates between the serenity of sunbathing and the terrible brutality of dominance and aggression.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Dealing with Spanser's bad habit sweet tooth; going joyriding with Greta and Beni.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Going up against infant Cesia's case of malaria and spotting a thief in the food store.

programme.title: Parents In The Wild
programme.desc: Exploring mantled guereza monkeys, where aunts and siblings aid parenting during daring climbs.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Get closer to nature and deepen your understanding of our complex natural world. Filmed in the highest quality, Love Nature offers viewers powerful stories of nature's beauty and wonder from around the globe.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean: Rhythms of Life
programme.desc: In the waters of the Caribbean, no animal can make it through life without a strategy for survival.

programme.title: Chasing the Rains
programme.desc: How elephants dig wells; a sudden river-filling downpour; cheetah Kuleta loses one of her cubs to lions; wild dog Phoenix faces off with a hyena mob.

programme.title: Wild Fighters
programme.desc: Family is everything, at least to a good number of animals; many species live in families, clans or groups; the survival of each individual depends on the family, and the family depends on the union of all its components.

programme.title: Hot life in Africa
programme.desc: Study the life-saving cooling techniques cheetahs, crocs, and giraffes use.

programme.title: Hot life in Africa
programme.desc: Explore breeding strategies that help wild dogs and hyenas survive the heat.

programme.title: Kenya Wildlife Diaries
programme.desc: Kenya opens a community-run rhino sanctuary in the heart of Samburu territory.

programme.title: Wild Family Ties
programme.desc: As with humans, there are many steps to successfully starting a family in the wild, from courtship techniques to mating habits and lifelong bonds.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin has a horrible case of athlete's foot and visits Dr. Budweiser, who is also a cloning expert, for treatment. The doctor takes a sample of Lupin's skin under the guise of treating his Athlete's foot, but the doctor has another plan up his sleeve.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious message appears in the newspaper and Lupin takes it as a sign from this late grandfather, Lupin I, to reclaim his diamond keepsake.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal the Dracula Heart Ruby from a mysterious woman known as Mother. The Dracula Heart Ruby is known to bleed once every century and whoever drinks its blood maintains their youth for another 100 years.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin steals a painting of Lupin I's beloved from Baltan Gallery in Paris. However, the painting turns out to be a forgery and Lupin has a clue as to who is painting the forgeries. With his daughter Sophie held hostage.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko attend a lavish party full of wealthy women in order to steal their jewelry. However, the castle tower where the party was being held turns out to be a rocket ship. The hijacked rocket transports the party and guests to a small island.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mrs. Alda, a wealthy heiress is kidnapped and Lupin shows up to claim the ransom money. However, the real mastermind behind the kidnapping is Mrs. Alda herself. After she gets the ransom money, she erases Lupin's memory and frames him for the crime.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin learns he needs a pure-hearted girl to find an ancient Persian treasure and his computer chooses a girl named Lori. After getting some hands-on training from Jigen and Goemon, the two are headed to Jordan to find the treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Golden Apple, known as "Eve's Apple" is being transported to New York City on board a luxury cruise ship and Inspector Zenigata has a gut feeling Lupin is after it. Inspector Zenigata's hunch is on the mark as Lupin and Jigen are onboard the ship.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon when Fujiko promises to marry him if he steals the ICPO's gold for her. Lupin pulls off the heist right under Inspector Zenigata's nose, but the two soon find themselves locked up in jail.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: It's the Mafia Boss' birthday party and everyone is gambling away. Lupin's next target is the casino's safe. While attending the party, Lupin meets a girl named Jenny, who is willing to help him pull off the heist to sell her name.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin breaks out a man named Parker from a Mexican prison in order to steal the treasure Parker had hidden away somewhere.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin, who was once duped by Mamushidayu into stealing diamonds, decides its payback time. Will Lupin get his revenge and finally get his share of diamonds after all?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: An ancient burial mound has been discovered and etched on its walls are ancient mythical creatures with jewel-encrusted eyes. Lupin makes off with the blue dragon's crystal eye and kidnaps the archeologist in charge.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang break into a vault full of uncut diamonds. However, the diamonds suddenly catch on fire, and guess who is being blamed for it!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Swiss Bank's Beirut branch is a mobile branch. Will Lupin manage to pull off the heist of this impenetrable bank and get out safely with Inspector Zenigata on his tail?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are after Taniyama's treasure from an ancient Chinese dynasty. Realizing that Lupin is after his treasure, Taniyama hires a lone assassin named Seiryuu to counter Goemon.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: How could Lupin and his gang refuse when a church priest asks them to retrieve the Dove's Eggs, the church's jewels, for the sake of Spoonland's children?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in New York City to steal a pinball machine made of solid gold. Lupin, Jigen, and Fujiko board a casino cruise ship and discover that they'll need Goemon's Zantetsuken sword to pull off the heist.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were pursuing Flight 107 when Soviet Union planes suddenly shoot it down for wandering into its territory inadvertently.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A ring called the Star of Alaska holds a single wheat seed inside it. The seed is a new species of wheat that can grow in minus 40 degrees and the CIA and KGB are determined to get their hands on it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon, now that he's won Fujiko's hand in marriage after stealing Marie Antoinette's wedding dress and ring.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A massive amount of gold is being transported in the cover of darkness, but on this rainy night, Lupin is busy being a bartender to a beautiful woman named Sara.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal an exquisite painting of a young girl from a Renoir art exhibit. Using the painting as bait, Lupin and his gang plan to steal Ghellon's impressive art collection.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: John Decker, an oil tycoon from Colorado hires Lupin to steal the US presidential limousine and promises to pay 10 million dollars in return.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were scoping out their next target, Macintosh Jewelry, the world's most expensive jewelry store when they end up inadvertently saving a young boy who was being kidnapped.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang make off with the New York Mafia's secret cash hoard. However, the suitcases were filled with old newspapers and as retribution, the mafia puts a hefty bounty on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang blow up Fontaubert Bank's underground safe to steal 5 tons worth of gold, but someone has beaten them to it. The thieves are a pair of disguise artists named John and Mary.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Efectos instantáneos

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: ¡Que viva la toxicidad!

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: Matlock

programme.desc: Looking carefully can help children with growing and learning. Mister Rogers has a purple flowered plant and takes time to look at it closely.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a daycare and sees children playing. He talks about why children need to go to day care sometimes. King Friday and Queen Sarah have to leave for a few days but Prince Tuesday does not want a babysitter.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about how some foods are better than others. Chef Brockett makes a tasty snack. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday discovers Old Goat eating from his garden. The King plants seeds everywhere.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: En el episodio de hoy de MAURY, estos hombres dicen que saben que la prueba de paternidad demostrará lo que siempre han sabido: que no son padres de los hijos de las mujeres que los trajeron aquí. ¡Ellas van a demostrar que están equivocados!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Centavia sospecha que su novio Richard la engaña con Kheisha, la niñera. Después, Kristy le revelará 2 secretos a su novio Matt que podrían terminar su relación. ¡Descubre estos secretos impactantes hoy!

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Imanol le dice a Adriana que le de otra oportunidad pero Adriana grita que lo odia y Iván sale, preguntándole a Imanol que fue lo que le hizo a ella para que lo odie.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Rosaura conversan sobre la pérdida de su hija. Adriana informa que ve muy mal a Imanol. Luis Mario trata de convencer a Rosaura de que no trabaje con Silvano. Ella no está de acuerdo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Maribella así como Silvano y Rosaura se encuentran en el mismo restaurante. Teobaldo le pregunta a su abuela porque le dijo a Luis Mario que la niña se llamaba Angélica.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Guillermo está decepcionado porque Jimena se fue con Rodrigo a ver a Imanol. Luisana lo calma y le dice que tiene que darle tiempo. Luis Mario le cuenta a Eduarda la crisis que sufrió Maribella.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva le dice a Luis Mario que Maribella si puede ver y que lo está engañando. Luis Mario no le cree. Imanol vuelve a pedirle disculpas a Adriana. Ella las acepta.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario contesta el teléfono pero nadie habla. Sonia le cuelga el teléfono a Fidelia y le pregunta con quien estaba hablando. Rodrigo lleva a Karina a su casa y queda en recogerla al día siguiente.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Maribella y Sinaí preparan todo para que cuando Rosaura traiga el café se le caiga encima a Maribella, para echarle la culpa. La doctora le informa a Karina que deben hacerle los exámenes nuevamente.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Teobaldo piensa cumplir lo que le prometió a Mairita pero su mamá lo descubre. Maribella quiere que Luis Mario se acueste con ella. Pero el no lo acepta.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Teobaldo le confiesa a Rosaura que Angeliquita no es hija de su mamá. Gabriel le propone a Minerva que lo ayude a criar a su hijo. Teobaldo le vuelve a decir a Rosaura que no es verdad.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda llama a Rosaura, diciéndole que su hija está muerta. Karina le dice a Rosaura que no les haga caso. Eduarda y Maribella se ríen por la broma que le gastaron a Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La doctora le informa a Karina que está gravemente enferma debido a su sangre. Mercedes llega cuando Silvano está besando a Rosaura y se mete reclamándole a Silvano que deje tranquila a Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Karina, desesperada, se toma una cantidad de pastillas para quitarse la vida. Silvano visita a Teobaldo. Él le va a contar lo de la niña pero se aparece Sonia y se calla por miedo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda y Maribella entran a la habitación de Rosaura para ponerle una sorpresa. María Julia le pide perdón a Iván por haber sido una mala madre.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Iván le da ánimos a Karina y le dice que lea la carta de Maximiliano. Luis Mario le cuenta a Gabriel lo que le pasó con Silvano y Rosaura.

programme.title: ONE Event
programme.desc: In the main event, a shot at the ONE Flyweight World Championship is on the line, as Malaysia's very own Gianni Subba takes on the surging Reece McLaren.

programme.title: ONE Event
programme.desc: Every kick, every strike and every grapple in the full replays of the ONE Championships numbered events in 2018.

programme.title: ONE Friday Fights 39
programme.desc: Experience all the action from the world’s largest martial arts organization on ONE Championship TV, featuring MMA, Muay Thai, kickboxing, and more! Check out the best fighters on the planet, weekly events, and behind-the-scenes originals!

programme.title: ONE Friday Fights 39
programme.desc: Experience all the action from the world’s largest martial arts organization on ONE Championship TV, featuring MMA, Muay Thai, kickboxing, and more! Check out the best fighters on the planet, weekly events, and behind-the-scenes originals!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the handover team approaches Green Bit, they are attacked by the fearsome fish that live off the coast of Dressrosa. But that's the least of their problems as they find the bridge to Green Bit has collapsed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro tracks the thief who stole his sword - and learns about a danger facing the Straw Hats! Meanwhile, Law, Usopp, and the others arrive at Green Bit only to find it inhabited by strange creatures, and swarming with the Navy soldiers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: All but done for, Sanji is trapped by Violet and her crew when she suddenly changes her mind and mysteriously turns on her own men! Meanwhile, Robin and Usopp come face to face with the Little People known as the Tontatta Tribe.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji gets in touch with Law in order to share a shocking secret - that could unsettle the Straw Hats' plans in Dressrosa for good! Meanwhile, Luffy's Block C battle begins, but will his Gum-Gum powers give him away?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Franky try to regroup after Doflamingo's betrayal, hoping that destroying the factory is not yet out of their grasp. Meanwhile Luffy makes a friend in the Colosseum and Usopp ends up thrust into an uncomfortable position!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Sunny is mysteriously deformed by the bizarre powers of Giolla! Can Nami, Chopper, and Brook act in time to save their beloved home? Meanwhile, the battle for Block C continues as Luffy suffers a staggering setback.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After knocking down the Giant, Hajrudin, as payback for what he did to Ucy, Luffy has to deal with Ideo, whose punch has the destructive force of a bomb, while the Funk Brothers show off their bizarre fighting technique.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami, Chopper, and Brooke keep trying to evade Jora and win back the Sunny even though it's been turned into a piece of art! In the Colosseum, Don Chin Jao finally faces Luffy - whose power will prove greater?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy stands along against Don Chinjao, and learns about the old grudge he bears against Garp! Meanwhile, Usopp and Robin get swept up in the Tontatta Kingdom's raid against the royal family, and Franky learns the eerie secret of Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontatta Kingdom gears up for its all-out assault on the Doflamingo Family, as Usopp and Robin are caught up in the war effort! Meanwhile, Franky arrives the headquarters of the toy movement where he finds Zoro, Nami & the others are cornered by Jora.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chin Jao's hatred of Garp and Luffy is finally explained, while his battle against Luffy comes to an end. With tremendous power, one of them is squarely eliminated! But is that really the end of the Colosseum battle?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the battle with Don Chinjao long behind him, Luffy advances to the final round! Block-D contender Cavendish, however, takes the chance and pounces on Luffy, who is defended by an unlikely ally! The agenda of Colosseum gladiator Rebecca is exposed.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Rebecca's deep bonds with the one-legged toy soldier are revealed! Her lineage can be traced to the previous ruler of Dressrosa - and her eternal bond with the damaged toy is linked to the violent overthrow of that regime by none other than Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Rebecca enters the ring for the battle for Block D, the crowd shows its contempt for her heritage - only to be scolded by an unlikely supporter. Meanwhile, the other Straw Hats start to reassemble to deal with the attack on the Sunny.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Doflamingo recounts for Law the surprising history of the Don Quixote Family, while Nami and the others battle the insane and powerful artist, Giolla! Her ultimate attack renders them incapacitated, and prompts the betrayal of one of their closest allies!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law is pinned by Fujitora, and Doflamingo has the upper hand! Only the most cunning of tricks could save Law's plan to hand Caesar over to Nami & the others! Meanwhile, the Sunny falls into danger again, & the battle for Block D heats up in the Colosseum.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law must put himself in harm's way to defend the Sunny and the Straw Hats from Doflamingo's all-out assault! With barely enough time to save the crew, plans change and send the Sunny on a new mission -- but will it be able to get underway?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law & Doflamingo are embroiled in a heated showdown which triggers Momonosuke's memories of Doflamingo's cruelty from the first time they met; meanwhile, after a tearful fanboy conversation Zoro finally gets to see Luffy but all eyes are fixed on Rebecca.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bartolomeo searches the Colosseum for Luffy but stumbles upon the medical center for the losers of the battles in the ring, but is everything at this center as it seems? Meanwhile, Rebecca has to fend off Rolling Logan's vicious bone-crushing grip attack.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The losers of the Colosseum battle who are being held below the infirmary have a surprising person in their midst! But do they have a clue as to their terrifying fate? Meanwhile, the Tontatta Kingdom's history is made clear.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bartolomeo finally finds Luffy and starts to lead him to Zoro, while the toy soldier begins to tell the heart-breaking story of how Doflamingo cheated the Riku dynasty out of their control of Dressrosa!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the toy soldier's story continues, the sad fate of King Riku and his army, and his daughter Princess Viola, is revealed as well as how the people of Dressrosa fell into the hands of Doflamingo. And all the toys in the country share a mysterious secret.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Kin'emon, and Luffy are reunited again, but little do they know that their reunion is being monitored by a potential threat! Meanwhile, the battle rages on between Doflamingo and Law as these two powerhouses clash.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Kin'emon make a mad dash to save Law but Navy Admiral Fujitora stands in their way, bringing his full power against them. The Navy is in hot pursuit as a ship approaches with unexpected visitors from the past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After revealing the horrible history of Dressrosa, Toy Soldier now shares their plan to liberate the Tontatta Kingdom and bring down the Doflamingo Family, Operation SOP. Luffy bumps into a heavily-wounded Bellamy and Bartolomeo

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp and Robin make their way via an underground tunnel dug by the tiny people of the Tontatta Tribe - a tunnel so small in fact, that Franky couldn't fit! Instead, Franky makes his way to the Toy House.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the contenders for the battle of Block D dwindle to only thirty, Rebecca has her hands full with the menacing Suleiman the Beheader! All hope seems lost that she can take him down and move on to the finals!

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A slipstream sends the Andromeda back in time to just before the Commonwealth fell. The crew must intervene to preserve history.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Answering a distress call leads the crew to pick up Beka's brother, now a Wayist, and his friend. They are connected to environmentalists trying to prevent space travel.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A black hole allows Dylan to communicate with his former fiancee, 300 years in the past. He can't abandon his mission to reform the Commonwealth, but can he bring her into the future?

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is imprisoned on a prison planet and must stage an escape as his crew tries to stage their own rescue.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Castalians board the Andromeda to finalize the charter for the New Commonwealth. When the leader is discovered dead, Tyr is the main suspect.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka learns that her father's former business partner deals in a highly addictive drug called Flash. The rest of the crew holds a "garage sale" to earn money for new ship parts.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda discovers her "sister ship", the Pax Magellanic. The crew aboard Pax is 300 years old, but have not aged a day

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Many of the mysteries surrounding Mutant X are revealed when Lexa (Karen Cliche) and Jesse (Forbes March) are captured by the Dominion and the team, along with Adam (John Shea), goes in to rescue them.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Adam (John Shea) and his Mutant X team go on a mission to protect the unwitting subjects of a covert human genetics program gone awry.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Brennan (Victor Webster) and Emma (Lauren Lee Smith) join the Mutant X team in fighting off Eckhart’s (Tom McCamus) Genetic Security Agency forces.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Jesse goes undercover as part of a family in the Mutant Underground to help prevent its disclosure to Eckhart.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Shalimar falls in love with a professor who claims to hold the key to reversing the mutation process.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: A rogue villain mutates into a TV transmission to tell the world about the New Mutants.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Kate gains superpowers when an Abnormal adheres itself to her after gunmen breach the Sanctuary in a bid to steal the creature.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Minnesota police hunt for a killer caller who confesses to a string of murders in a chilling, high-pitched voice, begging for forgiveness; no one can identify him until one woman survives a brutal attack.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the summer of 1976, the NYPD are chasing a man shooting at couples in parked cars with a gigantic, .44 caliber handgun; he taunts the city with terrifying letters until police get a lead about a suspect who has shot a neighbor's dog.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Brooklyn shop keepers are afraid of closing time as a killer shoots his victims while locking up their stores.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the 1990's, New York is on edge as a killer leaves coded clues at crime scenes and declares his compulsion to choose victims by their birth signs.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A rash of young men goes missing around Chicago during the 1970s; when bodies start washing up in the river, a pattern emerges; a small piece of evidence leads police to the home of a model citizen, where his furnace puts the suspect in the hot seat.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Police find a string of murdered women in shallow graves in very remote areas of the Alaskan wilderness; after months of searching, police zero in on a local family man living a double life that no one suspects.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Numerous women are found dead by the side of the road with a unique ligature that looks like a dog collar and leash; detectives are stumped until a 17-year-old girl manages an escape from a vicious kidnapper, leading police to a serial killer.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: The I-5 corridor in California is taken over by a brazen bandit who terrorizes the highway with a blitz of assaults and murders; the only clue to the killer's identity is a specific athletic tape used to bind his victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer taunts Wichita, Kan., for decades by sending brazen letters and taking credit for horrific kills; at the introduction of the computer era, the killer gets sloppy and accidentally leaves a digital clue.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the 1990s, Louisiana is terrorized by multiple serial killers; the Zachary Police Department discovers the key to solving their cases when a pattern emerges with personal items missing from each local victim.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: The sting operation in New Orleans continues as the investigation team begins running out of time to obtain the necessary information from the co-conspirator.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: TJ and his team head to Aruba to begin phase two of their investigation - attempting to obtain DNA evidence from Natalee's alleged burial site; Dave must convince his informant to go the extra mile.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: TJ races to the location where the co-conspirator claims he dug up Natalee's remains in 2010; working with the Aruban authorities, they search for DNA that could lead to convicting those involved in Natalee's disappearance.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: After two years following a lead, the investigators finally have evidence in hand that could answer the 12-year-old mystery of what happened to Natalee Holloway.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Phoenix Coldon
programme.desc: Phoenix Coldon vanishes; investigative reporter, Shawndrea Thomas, and retired deputy Police Chief Joe Delia attempt to unravel the mysterious unsolved case in the hope of finding justice for Phoenix.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Phoenix Coldon
programme.desc: Joe and Shawndrea follow up on a handful of Phoenix sightings since her disappearance and begin to question whether she'd been lured into a new life more dangerous than she could have anticipated; a surprising lead goes to an unexpected locale.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: It's Adventure Bay Western Days, when a herd of cows escape from a train at the railway station!/When their friend Alex decides he wants to be a member of the PAW Patrol the PUPS and Ryder let him come along for the ride.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Cap'n Turbot's boat runs aground, Ryder, Zuma, Skye, and Rocky must team up to save it before it sinks!/The PAW Patrol must pick all Farmer Yumi's fruit before an early snowstorm comes! But how can Chase help?

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder, Chase, and Rubble hatch a plan to help sea turtle hatchlings safely cross the road to get to the beach!/There's a beached baby whale in Adventure Bay! Can the Paw Patrol work together to reunite it with its mother?

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol rescue a lost kitty from the bay, but who will save them from all the mayhem she causes?/Ryder, Rubble, and Rocky call in Chase to help them free Katie and Cali's train from a rockslide!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol must work quickly to fix the tracks and remove a train car at the Adventure Bay Train Station, before the next train comes./Ryder and the PAW Patrol battle the clock to fix the lighthouse.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Marshal gets a new BFF when a gosling he names "Fuzzy" takes a liking to him. /When Mayor Goodway accidentally takes off in a hot air balloon, Ryder and the Paw Patrol must make a dramatic rescue to save her and win the race!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol need to rescue Alex on Jakes mountain./The pups find strange footprints in the snow on the mountain outside Adventure Bay. Everyone thinks it's a "snow monster" and it's scaring the skiers away.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder gets a call from the Circus ringmaster - Ellie the baby elephant has escaped from the circus train! /Mayor Goodway's purse chicken "Chickaletta" has gone missing. Ryder and the Paw Patrol search Adventure bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to rescue Alex when he takes off on his new "super trike"./Marshall proves he is a true hero when he stops to put out a real fire on the beach during a race against the clock for a trophy.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Mr. Porters van full of puppy food slides on the ice near the shore; Ryder and the PAW Patrol must save the day!/Katie and her cat Cali are on the chair lift when it stops leaving them above the ski hill with no way to get down!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: It's Halloween! Capt'n Turbot has decorated an old wreck as a pirate ship for a town party. When the ship mysteriously heads out to sea captained by a "ghost" Ryder and the Paw Patrol must save the ship and discover the ghost!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Santa's Sleigh crashes and the reindeer run off - Ryder and the PAW PATROL have to help Santa finish delivering presents and save Christmas!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: We see a flashback of how Rubble became a member of the Paw Patrol!/When Wally the Walrus gets tangled in an old fishing net, Ryder and the Paw Patrol need to get him to the surface and back to shore safely.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Farmer Yumi's carrots are disappearing and she calls Ryder and the Paw Patrol for help. /Katie is excited to be entering one of the Paw Patrol pups into a puppy grooming competition "Puptacular" in the next town.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol clean up a small oil spill in the water near Adventure Bay. /When Adventure Bay's famous statue ends up at the bottom of the Bay, Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to help Mayor Goodway bring it back!

programme.title: The Greatest American Hero
programme.desc: Ralph and Pam's plans (all of them) take a back seat when Rhonda's Mom Rose is kidnapped, opening the door to a Soviet operation to steal U.S. secrets.

programme.title: The Greatest American Hero
programme.desc: Ralph retires the suit after his super-heroics result in a near-tragedy.

programme.title: The Greatest American Hero
programme.desc: Tony is accused of arson, and Bill and Ralph must find evidence to clear his name.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: Stark accidentally sends himself, Crichton, Aeryn. D'Argo and Jool are back in time where they alter the timeline.

programme.title: Farscape
programme.desc: In need of supplies, Crichton lands his transport pod on a dying leviathan which is full of hungry cannibals.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: The earth is 4.5 billion years old and it is slowly dying. Tectonic activity is slowly cooling the planet – the continents will eventually move together to form a new supercontinent called Pangea Ultima.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Stephen Hawking, though suffering from amyotrophic lateral sclerosis has developed a unique understanding of the universe.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: There is a theory that scientists once dismissed as absurd - that long ago the Earth became so cold every inch of it was entombed in ice.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Stars Above
programme.desc: The life cycle of stars reveal to us the past and the future of Earth and ourselves.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Invasion Mars
programme.desc: For over 50 years we have bombarded Mars with our probes and landers. Spying from orbit to map terrain, finding her strengths and weaknesses. The time nearing for the full scale invasion of the planet- when humans walk on Mars and claim it for their own.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Invasion Mars
programme.desc: For over 50 years we have bombarded Mars with our probes and landers. Spying from orbit to map terrain, finding her strengths and weaknesses. The time nearing for the full scale invasion of the planet- when humans walk on Mars and claim it for their own.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity keeps us on the ground and the planets in their orbits, yet we only notice it when it's not there. In space we cheat gravity; falling just as fast but missing the ground. Now this fundamental universal force is slowly giving up its secrets.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Exo Planets
programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer more closely and with evermore fidelity at nearby stars, they are discovering countless exo planets. How many Earth-like planets are out there? Could one of them hold life not so different from our own?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Sun
programme.desc: The sun bathes our planet in warmth and light. It powers the machinery of nature, our weather, and it encourages and sustains life on land and at sea. We study it closely, and it can reveal the secrets of all other stars.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Stars Above
programme.desc: The life cycle of stars reveal to us the past and the future of Earth and ourselves.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Dark Side
programme.desc: In terms of the Universe, we know we don't know much, especially when it comes to dark matter and dark energy. Scientists are devoting so much of their time to discovering as much as the possibly can about this mysterious matter.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: Discover the most powerful telescopes on the planet as they search for the mysteries of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it’s also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: They key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient skywatchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Boyz n the Hood
programme.desc: Three friends struggle to survive in South Central Los Angeles where friendship, pain, danger, and love form a true picture of life in the 'hood in this critically acclaimed, action-filled story.

programme.title: Four Brothers
programme.desc: After their adoptive mother is murdered during a grocery store hold-up, the Mercer bros reunite to take the matter into their own hands. As they track down the killer, they quickly realize that their old ways of doing business have new consequences.

programme.title: Hustle & Flow
programme.desc: The tale of DJay, a pimp whose hustle selling sexy Nola leaves him wondering if this is it for him. Only when he trades contraband for a keyboard and bumps into his old schoolfriend Key does he see a way out by laying down some tracks.

programme.title: Predestination

programme.title: The Girl in the Spider's Web

programme.title: Bound

programme.title: Kiss the Girls
programme.desc: Eight kidnapped women. All beautiful. All talented. All in danger of having their lives cut cruelly short if police detective Alex Cross and key witness Kate McTiernan can’t locate the elusive “collector” who calls himself Casanova.

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: An F.B.I. Agent goes undercover to catch a gang of surfers who may be bank robbers.

programme.title: Assault on Precinct 13
programme.desc: The isolated inhabitants of an abandoned police station are under attack by the overwhelming numbers of a seemingly unstoppable street gang.

programme.title: The Night of the Hunter
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum stars in an unforgettable role as a psychopathic preacher in the relentless pursuit of two children who have their dead father's stolen fortune hidden in a doll. Shelley Winters co-stars.

programme.title: The Bank Shot
programme.desc: Fresh from his recent jailbreak, criminal mastermind George C. Scott is already plotting his next bank heist. This time he's thinking big...he's not just taking the loot, he's stealing the whole bank in a film brimming with imaginative silliness.

programme.title: Kiss the Girls
programme.desc: Eight kidnapped women. All beautiful. All talented. All in danger of having their lives cut cruelly short if police detective Alex Cross and key witness Kate McTiernan can’t locate the elusive “collector” who calls himself Casanova.

programme.title: Spell

programme.desc: After a family is forced to relocate for their son's health, they begin experiencing supernatural behavior in their new home, which turns out to be a former mortuary and séance parlor.

programme.desc: Rebecca DeMornay is terrifying in this brutal gorefest. When her sons break into a home and take the owners hostage, she teaches them what real torture is all about. Costars Shawn Ashmore.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: Cut off from continents, remote islands have become floating arks, attracting migrating species and forging new ones. Take a privileged glimpse into the secret lives of the rare and exotic species that inhabit these lost worlds.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: These cities and towns are special places where the past coexists with the present, creating cultures totally unique to their people and their part of the world and adhering to ancient traditions and while introducing modern innovations.

programme.title: World's Greatest

programme.title: The First 48

programme.desc: In Harris County, Deputy Jason Brown is called out on Easter Sunday to investigate the brutal shooting of a woman who was a school bus driver and mother of two. Meanwhile, Harris County Sergeant Sidney Miller takes on the murder of a young father.

programme.title: The First 48

programme.desc: Two of America's most successful criminal masterminds and their brutal gangs go head to head. Jesse James' Gang of gun-slinging, sharp-shooting bank robbers battle Al Capone's Gang of notorious, bullet-spewing Tommy Gun mobsters.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: Ming Warrior, the vicious death dealer who used exploding land-mines and fire arrows to launch China's greatest empire battles the Musketeer, an elite French fighter who blasted enemies with a gut-busting musket.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una lucha entre hermanos enfurecidos termina con un apuñalamiento. Se detiene a un hombre delirante después que atacó a su hermano y a su vecino. La policía encuentra a una pareja en una casa ajena.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La dueña se sorprende porque un delincuente fugitivo se esconde en su tienda. Oficiales encuentran más que muebles en una furgoneta. Una mujer por tercera vez invade propiedad privada.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre hostiga a su hermana y compañeros de trabajo. Un conductor se hace el inocente, pero sus pasajeros lo desenmascaran. Un hombre con un pasado delictivo jura mejorar por su hijo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un joven delata a su grupo que se pasea en autos robados. Un repartidor de pizza llama a la policía al robarle. Los agentes identifican un olor característico cuando detienen un automóvil sospechoso.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se captura a un sospechoso de robo de identidad con antecedentes. Dos mujeres aprenden a anotar lo que hay en sus maletas. La policía le aconseja a un joven que sus padres quieren lo mejor para él.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre esposado apuesta que puede escapar de los agentes. Un joven no puede negar la evidencia que lo incrimina de robo. Hay chispas cuando un hombre se fuga en alta velocidad con su familia dentro.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una madre protectora intenta esconder a su hija de la policía. La policía busca las llaves de una guantera. Un conductor de transporte compartido es detenido cuando su pasajero levanta sospechas.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una madre con una orden judicial no logra evadir a la policía. Se detiene a un delincuente de tránsito habitual. Se reporta una pelea y los policías encuentran evidencia de una discusión sangrienta.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un ladrón buscado se rinde tras saltar demasiadas cercas. Un delincuente no quiere salir de la casa de su abuela. Todo es difícil para un hombre con un ciclomotor cuestionable.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conflicto en el minimercado termina en riña de parqueadero. Un pasajero de auto descoordinado atrae la atención de la policía. Un sospechoso jura que fue hasta una tienda cerrada para leer su menú.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer se pone nerviosa cuando trata de evitar a un oficial en bicicleta. Un policía investiga un robo de carro complicado. Los condimentos que escoge un hombre alerta a la policía con sospechas.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor ebrio se estrella en la casa de una familia. Una licencia suspendida no impide que un hombre lleve a su padre a casa. Un auto lleno de adolescentes es detenido en camino a una película.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Huyen los vehículos jugando carreras cuando llega la policía. Un conductor vacilón se ríe de su error. Una mujer fugitiva se preocupa más por su higiene oral que por su orden de captura.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un motociclista casi se mata después de estrellarse en una carretera oscura. En una parada, la policía pide información a los pasajeros. Un conductor joven admite que su situación no es favorable cuando la policía lo detiene.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La posible sentencia de ir a prisión asusta a un sospechoso y huye. Los oficiales ayudan a unos padres a razonar. La policía intenta detener a una mujer furiosa que atacó a su exnovio con un martillo.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer desafiante toma una mala decisión mientras su novio no interviene. Una etiqueta falsa y una historia confusa no pasan la prueba de indagación. Un padre y un hijo pelean en público.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones fight a vampire queen who kidnaps Paige and tries to turn her against Piper and Phoebe.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe is irritated with the lack of attention of Cole and destroys five of his demons in a couple of days.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe's unborn baby begins to show signs of demonic powers as it begins to take control of her body and attack Paige and anyone else who might be a threat to it.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: While Phoebe feels Cole trying to contact her, the Angel of Destiny comes to the Halliwell manor and proposes to remove the powers of the sisters as a reward for vanquishing The Source.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: While seeking the advice of a fortune teller regarding her missing powers, Phoebe discovers in a premonition that a demon is going to kill them all after murdering the last one of the coven they were supposed to protect.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed

programme.desc: Nikki unknowingly becomes the target of an international terrorist group, planning to detonate bombs across the city in exchange for the release of their recently imprisoned leader.

programme.desc: With Chris's entire class counting on him to master algebra in time for a math competition, Rochelle takes it upon herself to tutor Chris.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: With the end of the school year fast approaching, Chris decides to exact revenge on Caruso to pay him back for making Chris's life miserable for the past two years.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: After Chris tests poorly on a standard exam, his teacher, Ms. Morello, refers him to the school's guidance counselor, Mr. Abbott.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Caruso relinquishes his role as school bully after getting bullied himself. However, without Caruso to establish the school's power hierarchy and with everyone vying to fill his shoes, Chris and Greg realize they'd better come up with a fast solution.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Things take a literal turn for the worse when a license-less Chris volunteers to move his dad's car, but finds himself driving the car all the way to school as a result of trying to impress Tasha. Rochelle spends an interesting day at traffic court.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: As a result of their apartment being broken into, Julius and Rochelle decide it's a good idea to get a dog, something Chris has always wanted.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris

programme.desc: When Chris' entire family comes down with the flu, Rochelle and Julius make arrangements for Mr. Omar to look after Chris until the family recovers.

programme.desc: Suzanne becomes a viral-video sensation after she's caught dancing on camera. Meanwhile, Marilyn serves up soul-food lessons to young Lindsey.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Lindsey taps into her mother's credit card to order a sweater. Elsewhere, Kevin feigns being ill to score a coveted baseball jersey.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: An exhausted Nick resists Suzanne's romantic advances, leading her to worry about the health of their relationship.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Victoria tries to win over the difficult kids of a man she likes, Elka is resistant to wintering in Florida with Max, and Melanie and Joy volunteer at a senior center.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: As Victoria interviews the governor's candidly opportunistic wife, Elka goes on trial and attempts to sway the verdict by flirting with an elderly juror.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Elka's on the lam and the women go looking for her…in Amish country. Meanwhile, Joy's a source of scandal as the Governor's alleged mistress and faces deportation while Victoria finds herself a little too "at home" with the Amish.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: The women are terrified that an ex-con Victoria deceived will show up at the house, and Joy finally meets her son Owen, who thinks it may be best not to stay in contact.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: After getting each other dates for another shared fake birthday, the women's night involves a Jesus look-alike, Siamese twins, an impressionist, and an astute waiter.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: While rehearsing for a battle of the bands, Rick poaches away talented lead singer Joy, leaving Melanie, Victoria and Elka no choice but to use autotune microphones.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Joy learns from a fertility clinic director that Rick is their most sought-after donor, and Victoria method-acts as an old woman to land a prestigious stage role.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Looking for "GBFFs" like they had in L.A., the women go to a gay bar, where Victoria is mistaken for a drag queen, and Elka punches out her former best friend.

programme.title: Raising Expectations

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Paige receives what she thinks is a love poem from a teacher, but Wayne disagrees. Things get so heated, the kids -­‐ worried their parents might get a divorce -­‐ intervene.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela mira de lejos la boda y observa cuando Dínora dispara contra la multitud, la policía persigue a la asesina y Rosario llega al lugar del suceso, Gabriela sospecha de su complicidad.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Al enterarse de lo sucedido, Norma visita a Gabriela, quien muestra su amor de madre. Dínora se interna en unos pantanos, la policía previene a los Reyes sobre posibles nuevos ataques.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Armando y Fernando van a la casa donde dormía Dínora para borrar pistas que los comprometan, pero se sorprenden al verla, ella jura que la misión no termina hasta acabar con sus dos objetivos.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Cansada de la agitada vida nocturna de su esposo, Gabriela se sincera con Sara, quien decide vigilar de cerca a Fernando y lo sigue hasta las pesebreras, donde tiene una cita con su amante.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara le cuenta a su madre delante de Martín lo que vio y juntas van tras Fernando hasta una casa, donde reconocen en la oscuridad a su amante, Gabriela pide un arma y discute con su hija.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela echa a Fernando de la hacienda, pero Dínora irrumpe en su habitación por la noche y amenaza con matar a Sara si no la obliga a marcharse de la hacienda, Malcolm y Carmela se ríen.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Delante de Fernando, Gabriela echa a Sara de la hacienda y le dice que ha decidido quedarse sola con su esposo. Norma tiene un mal presentimiento mientras Dínora vigila día y noche a su presa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora amenaza a Gabriela con lastimar a Martín si la delata de nuevo con la policía. Armando y Rosario visitan a Fernando y se enteran de que Dínora se esconde en la hacienda Elizondo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Rosario le reclama a Dínora por obligar a Gabriela a echar a Sara, y le aconseja a Martín que huya de la hacienda. Fernando lo traslada al primer piso para que no descubra a su amante.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín le promete a su hija que no la abandonará jamás, Pepa inspecciona la nueva habitación de su amigo y amenaza a Fernando con denunciarlo por abuso. Los Reyes le dan la bienvenida a Sara.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los padres de Dínora le preguntan a Fernando por su hija y él niega saber su paradero, Martín escucha detrás de la puerta y empieza a atar cabos. Gabriela también se cambia de habitación.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Mientras Juan intuye que algo malo sucede en la hacienda Elizondo, Gabriela le confiesa a Rosario que su padre corre peligro. En un descuido, Martín observa a Fernando y Dínora cuando se besan.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín descubre a los amantes y empieza a gritar, desesperado Fernando le tapa la boca hasta desmayarlo, lo da por muerto y monta el cuerpo en el carro para deshacerse de él, Martín reacciona.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín despierta en un sanatorio, los empleados de los Reyes reportan normalidad en la hacienda Elizondo; sin embargo, las hermanas deciden comprobar por sus propios medios lo que sucede.

programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams race through Siem Reap, Cambodia, where they face the second and final double U-turn of the season.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million prize on the line, the final three teams travel to New Orleans, where one team is crowned the winner.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.desc: With her investigation complete, Special Prosecutor Wendy Scott-Carr presents her evidence against Will to the grand jury in hopes of sending him to prison for bribery. Meanwhile, Eli and Stacie Hall square off once again. Carrie Preston returns as Elsbet

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack gets a special behind-the-scenes look at a retirement home for chimpanzees where caregivers have rescued over 250 chimps that now live in large family groups on specially designed islands in Florida.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family search everywhere for chimpanzees in Rwanda's Nyungwe Forest. They get up close and personal with some colobus monkeys and Jack meets an old friend who is pioneering a conservation effort for the local women.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Bottoms Up
programme.desc: Jungle Jack goes to the ends of the Earth to meet nature's most captivating creatures! Today, adventures from the frigid waters of South America to elephant country in Africa and all the way up to Alaska's Glacier Bay.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top Predators
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for six ravenous encounters with mighty carnivores at the top of the food chain. Grizzly bears, Nile crocs, lions, African wild dogs, tiger sharks and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Ebb and Flow
programme.desc: Being an animal is thirsty work! Learn how water impacts the lives of elephants, hippos, caiman, giraffes and more! Six stories about the water supply in diverse ecosystems around the planet.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathleen depart Juneau, Alaska aboard the Wilderness Explorer in search of the endless natural beauty of Glacier Bay. Among their encounters: are bears, humpback whales, and glaciers. Jack also explores an old gold mine.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack for his favorite gorilla treks from Rwanda's Virunga Mountains. The Hanna's also visit veterinarians working with the wild gorillas, and a very special orphanage.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Take a step back into the past, and get a unique behind the scenes tour of the famous Hearst Castle in California. Stephen Hearst, the great grandson of William Randolph Hearst gives Jack the grand tour of the family ranch.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Gabon is home to some of the wildest beaches on the planet, and Pongara is no exception. Come along with Jack as he witnesses one of nature's most awe-inspiring feats -- one-ton Leatherback Sea Turtles returning to shore to lay their eggs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack and his grandson on safari to Tanzania's Selous Game Reserve, the largest reserve in Africa. They encounter territorial hippos, nesting crocodiles along with elephant, giraffe, impala and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down some of the weirdest, wackiest and wildest animal behaviors on the planet.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his grandson as they journey to the lush jungles of Lake Manyara National Park in Tanzania. They encounter an elephant roadblock, migrating pelicans, baboons, hippos, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for his all-time favorite animal adventures in the wild! The Great Migration, Mountain Gorillas, Elephants, Mandrills and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he enrolls his grandkids in zookeeper training at Arizona's Wildlife World Zoo! From training Sea Lions and bottle-feeding baby animals to encounters with Kangaroos, Lemurs, Warthogs, Ostrich, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he visits the tropical island of Borneo in Malaysia where he comes face-to-face with unique proboscis monkeys.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the bustling city of Cape Town to the wild eco-systems in the African bush, Jack and his family discover how wildlife is faring in this beautiful country and meet the conservationists dedicated to protecting it all.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and Sue as they head to the southern tip of Chile to explore the untamed region of Patagonia! The land beneath the towering Andes Mountains is home to Condors, Guanacos, and some of the most beautiful Glaciers in the world.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Find out the answers to some of nature’s biggest mysteries! Why do gorillas spend so much time in trees, why do male lions have such shaggy manes, why do jellyfish live upside down? You’ve got questions, and Jungle Jack has the answers!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to Florida to meet some unexpected residents in the small town of Wauchula. Nestled among the orange groves, the Center for Great Apes is providing a loving home to dozens of orangutans and chimpanzees in need.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack visits a local market in a Peruvian jungle town to get a first-hand look at how the illegal pet trade is threatening many native species. Then he and Sue meet a man who's making a big difference for hundreds of primates on Monkey Island.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Countdown to Discovery
programme.desc: Join Jack as he meets up with six of the planet’s most recently discovered animals, like the elusive okapi, adorable pygmy hippo, rare sun-tailed monkey, highly endangered mountain gorilla, the see-through Fijian crested iguana, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack behind the scenes for some of his most memorable moments like getting pecked by an ostrich, tangling with a snake, taking fashion advice from a Samburu warrior, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Back to the Wild
programme.desc: When animals get injured in the wild, conservationists and veterinarians step in to lend a helping hand. In this Wild Countdown Jack is counting down six special stories of lucky creatures returning to their native habitats!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and Kathaleen hike up a mountain in Phukett, Thailand to assist in the back-to-the-wild release of two endangered gibbons. The Hannas visit to The Gibbon Sanctuary, where the sick or injured small apes are rehabilitated.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as meets creatures battling back and returning to the wild. Manatees, Bald Eagles, Sea Turtles, Crowned Cranes and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack discovers the incredible dedication of caregivers in the hills of Tennessee's Smoky Mountains. Baby Birds, Raccoons, Possums and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets creatures thriving in their tropical island homes, like the Bison of Catalina Island, Flamingos in Curacao, Sea Lions in the Galapagos, along with Bats, Dolphins, and a special island dedicated to Monkeys!

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a “black box.”

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seem–from slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.
