programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark manages to capture a hawk but falls into danger with a rattlesnake. A stranger comes to his rescue and Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas takes in an orphaned teen being raised by his abusive uncle after there is trouble at the school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When his employer begins to suspect him of embezzlement, bookkeeper Asa Manning decides to hire a professional gunman to take care of the problem.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A drought has forced local cowhands to seek work on a railroad construction project, but executives are afraid workers will desert them if they believe an old man's claim of making rain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds of the body of a murder victim, Lucas, his friend Artemus and Marshall Torrance begin a search for the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When renegade Apaches wound Lucas and kidnap Mark, Marshall Torrance joins with U.S. Marshall Sam Buckhart to form a rescue posse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is the town's representative to the railroad commission until an infamous train robber dies and leaves his ill-gotten wealth to Lucas. Lucas must clear his name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a rancher dies after the bank forecloses the mortgage on his property, his son blames the banker for his father's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a wealthy rancher is killed, Mark suggests that they seek the aid of a mind reader to identify the murderer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A group of outlaws devise a plan to get rid of Lucas so that they can take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas kills a mountain man in a brawl, his father arrives in North Fork to break his other boys out of jail and take revenge on Lucas and Marshall Torrance.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Newly arrived gunslinger Al Walker throws a mammoth party at the saloon, keeping acting Marshall Ben Waller busy until Lucas is forced to intervene.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas accuses a newspaper writer's misleading articles of causing an innocent man's death, the writer begins writing articles about Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gavin and Ezra Martin think that Lucas killed their son Clemmie while taking part in a train robbery and Lucas refuses to tell them what really happened.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alan Richards plans to build a dam in Africa on a tribe's ancestral land. The tribe's witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Woodrow, a janitor living in the year 1890, accidentally activates a time traveling helmet which transports him to 1962 - then promptly breaks down.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hobo, clown, bagpipe player, ballerina and military officer are trapped in a huge cylinder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A gung-ho young soldier gets a new viewpoint on war when he inexplicably changes places with a Japanese officer trying to stop his superior from leading a charge against American forces.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paul Radin has invited three people to join him in his bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A vagrant steps into a murdered gangster's expensive shoes and is taken over by the dead man's ghost, who vows to remain on Earth to seek revenge against his killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On a hunting trip, Hyder Simpson and his dog Rip dive into a lake after a raccoon. When he gets home he finds that no one can see or hear him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Actor Rance McGrew makes TV Westerns for a living, but he's a lousy actor and a worse cowboy. Despite that, each week he "wins" against the bad guys. Finally, the bad guys have had enough and decide to teach McGrew a lesson.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The senior residents of Sunnyvale decide that the secret to youth is acting young, and in particular playing a childhood game called "kick-the-can."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Fortune discovers that a piano he bought his wife for her birthday has magical properties - the music that it plays makes people reveal their true essence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jeff Myrtlebank comes back to life at his own funeral and soon begins to act very strangely...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Kanamits, 9-foot tall aliens, arrive on Earth with one lofty goal: To Serve Man.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Awakened by the cries of their daughter Bettina, Chris and Ruth Miller enter her room to find that she has vanished - even though they still hear her crying for help. Chris' physicist friend Bill thinks she moved into another dimension.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Old Ben, who is able to transform himself into anything, tries to help a crippled little girl.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: David Gurney wakes up to find that no one - his wife, his co-workers, his best friend, not even his own mother knows him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An astronaut declares himself a god when his ship lands on a planet populated by people smaller than ants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Oliver Crangle is a bitter, prejudiced man. Through unknown means, he intends to shrink every evil person in the world at four o'clock.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A loud-mouthed braggart's boasts attract the attention of some aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An elderly couple visit the New Life Corporation, hoping to transport their personalities into youthful artificial bodies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An alien who crash-lands into a remote mountain village stirs up the villagers' fears and animosity, but he befriends a little boy and gives him a mysterious present.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquist is convinced that his dummy, Willie, is alive and evil. He makes plans for a new act with a new dummy: plans that Willie doesn't support!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a newlywed couple briefly returns to the groom's childhood home, the ties of the past prove too strong to resist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A widower buys a robot grandmother for his three children.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Cavender, an angel trying to win his wings, tries to help down-on-her-luck Agnes, who has just been fired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve and is reminded by former students that he has, indeed, had an impact on their lives.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol makes a deal with Pamela to wipe the slate clean on behalf of her friends; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah get on the road to Oceanside to fill them in on a plan; the Commonwealth celebrates Founders Day.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene goes on the run after the Founders Day incident; Pamela tasks Mercer to investigate his whereabouts, to Max and Princess' dismay; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah encounter an unusual complication at an abandoned Renaissance Faire.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol investigate the whereabouts of their friends after Pamela disappears them from the Commonwealth; Pamela asks Yumiko to prosecute Eugene on behalf of the Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Separated from their children, Maggie, Gabriel and Rosita track a military convoy to a mysterious destination; Ezekiel, Kelly, Negan and Annie find themselves at a work site; Daryl and Carol follow a train that has taken Connie aboard.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ezekiel and Negan team up to lead a clandestine labor revolt against the warden; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah catch up with Luke and Jules fleeing Oceanside; Eugene stands trial with Yumiko as his defense attorney.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Alexandrians and the prisoners head back to the Commonwealth to confront Pamela Milton; a swarm approaches the city.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol rush Judith to the hospital; Rosita, Eugene and Gabriel search for Coco; Maggie and Negan take arms against Pamela; as the citizens of the Commonwealth deal with the herd, the heroes assemble for one last stand to save their future.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Rick desperately tries to escape the CRM, but his hope fades with every failed escape attempt; he is forced to find his way in this new world and risks losing himself in the process.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Michonne finds unexpected help on her search for Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Rick and Michonne must find a way to survive.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Rick and Michonne try to find the love they had.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Dangerous people make Rick and Michonne's journey difficult.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Rick and Michonne have to perform a near-impossible miracle.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick searches for his family after emerging from a coma; Morgan and Duane help teach Rick the new rules for survival.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol llevan a Judith al hospital, mientras que Rosita, Eugene y Gabriel buscan a Coco. Por otro lado, Maggie y Negan se enfrentan a Pamela y los héroes se reúnen para una última batalla.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Rick trata de escapar de CRM, pero su esperanza se desvanece más y más con cada fracaso. No tiene otra opción que adaptarse a esta nueva realidad, aunque la esencia de su personalidad podría perderse en el proceso.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Michonne ayuda a Aiden y Bailey a reencontrarse con su caravana. Agradecidos, ellos y su amigo Nat juran que la ayudarán a encontrar a Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Rick y Michonne buscan una forma de sobrevivir bajo el escrutinio de los militares de la República Cívica mientras fingen no conocerse.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Michonne informa a Rick sobre su hijo, con la esperanza de que acepte volver a casa con ella. Sin embargo, Rick sigue negándose, ya que quiere terminar la misión de Okafor de reformar el CRM.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: El camino de Rick y Michonne no es tan sencillo como habían previsto; todo lo contrario, está lleno de peligros. Además, sospechan que alguien los persigue con la intención de acabar con ellos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Beale le revela a Rick la verdad sobre el colapso de Omaha y el inminente ataque contra Portland. El CRM pretende eliminar todas las comunidades independientes de supervivientes del mundo, y solo Rick y Michonne pueden impedírselo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol provoca que Daryl se sienta absolutamente incómodo. Alpha y Beta tienen dudas sobre una persona.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Una pelea causa tensiones en Oceanside mientras los habitantes de Alejandría se embarcan en una misión de alto riesgo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo debe averiguar cómo salir de una situación peligrosa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo debe defender a Alexandria de una fuerza amenazante.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras el encuentro de Daryl y Lydia con Alpha, los habitantes de las comunidades enfrentadas a los Susurradores, que se aproximan a la Cumbre, tienen dos opciones: huir o pelear. Entretanto, surgen problemas entre Eugene y Stephanie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne lleva a Virgil de regreso a su misteriosa isla para reunirse con su familia. A cambio, Virgil promete armas que podrían cambiar el rumbo de la Guerra de los Susurradores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne devuelve a Virgil a la isla misteriosa de la que proviene para que se reencuentre con su familia. A cambio, Virgil promete que le entregará un arsenal que cambiará el rumbo de la guerra contra los Susurradores.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent West gets involved in a bizarre extortion scheme involving green "Venusians" who claim they need gold for spaceship fuel.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon visit a town named Justice during Law and Order Seek and find it the site for a convention of criminals.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon are assigned to free a fellow agent from Devil's Island.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent West is kidnapped by a madman who plans to create an underwater kingdom that will control the world's shipping lanes.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The evil, diminutive Dr. Loveless impoverishes an Indian tribe so that he can become their benefactor -- and their god.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon fail to save the life of a highly unpopular Latin American dictator they have been assigned to guard.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent Gordon has a vivid nightmare about a prisoner's mother's ghost who attempts to clear the name of her son, imprisoned 35 years.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon seek the reason why the life of a federal judge is being threatened.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: James West is tried by a court of cutthroats who believe he has murdered his friend and fellow agent, Artemus Gordon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon tangle with an ex-confederate colonel who possesses the power to control the fourth dimension.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are assigned to guard a member of an investment group set up so the surviving member will gain all the assets.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon encounter an old adversary who has found the secret of turning objects into gold.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are assigned to escort the Sultan of Ramapurand his sacred white elephant, a gift to President Grant.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon become involved in a bizarre Siberian prisoner exchange in Vladivostok without leaving the United States.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom solves bowing in the roof. Richard shows Kevin the rough plumbing. Tom helps get LVLs fastened in place. Norm revisits the old Charlestown house. Tom opens up the back wall for the new bump-out.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old chimney gets new gas fireplace units. Mark installs a retaining wall with a bluestone cap. Norm visits a salvage yard. Richard shows rough plumbing and electrical. Zakim Bridge engineering.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Richard sees the last wooden whaling ship in the world. Norm sees the progress on the dormer. Brick veneer is fitted to the bump out. Kevin drops by a kitchen designer. Norm and Tom install shutters.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger visits a community garden while Richard roughs in fireplace units. Norm and Tom add details to the window trim. Mauro Henrique paints the exterior window trim and puts up samples for the door.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom upgrades the front door before he and Kevin install wainscoting and copper roofing. Norm visits a city archaeologist. A tile contractor makes a feature wall insert in the master shower.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom builds a hidden door to the basement. A new fence is installed. Richard meets a homeowner turning a lighthouse into a summer home. Norm and Tom restore the old exterior. A marble mantel is fitted.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin tests the new electronics. Richard shows Angela the induction stove. Norm sees the mechanical room and the changes to the guest room, bath, and living room. Kevin checks out the outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: This Old House kicks off the second project of their 35th Anniversary Season: an addition to a 1966 Colonial Revival in historic Lexington, Mass. which extends back to the American Revolution.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom shows how to demo in phases. Kevin visits a concrete shop. Norm explains the first-floor framing. Tom builds the rear gable wall. Roger lays out new footings. Kevin explains building permits.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roof framing begins in Lexington with Tom and Kevin. They build a new farmer's porch reminiscent of Colonial-style homes, as well as a structural ceiling.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm visits the Hancock-Clarke House. Tom and Kevin help install a corner desk stair, and Richard helps offset a tub trap.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A stream requires trees and plants to be removed from the yard. Tom and Kevin connect the kitchen to the old great room. Richard shows Kevin the rough plumbing conditions in the kitchen.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin meets electricians to see a rough electrical inspection, and Tom installs a hybrid railing system. The homeowner designs a new family kitchen.

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: Best of Shakur Stevenson
programme.desc: All the best fight moments of Shakur Stevenson.

programme.title: Shakur Stevenson vs Oscar Valdez
programme.desc: On April 30th, 2022, Shakur Stevenson fought Oscar Valdez for the WBC and WBO World Super Featherweight Titles at MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Shakur put on a brilliant performance, outmatching Valdez on his way to a clear unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Shakur Steveson vs Felix Caraballo
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2020, a young Shakur Stevenson fought Felix Caraballo in a super featherweight bout in The Bubble at MGM Grand. After knocking down Caraballo in rounds 1 and 6, Stevenson would get the KO with a devastating body shot in round six.

programme.title: Shane Mosley vs Antonio Margarito
programme.desc: On January 24th, 2009 Shane Mosley and Antonio Margarito fought for WBA Super World Welterweight title at the Staples Center in Los Angeles with what was supposed to be a 12 round bout only went nine resulting in a victory for Mosley.

programme.title: Shane Mosley vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On June 17th, 2000 Shane Mosley faced Oscar De la Hoya for the first time for the IBA and WBC World welterweight titles at the Staples Center in Los Angeles the bout went a full 12 rounds ending with a split decision win for Mosley.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Thomas Hearns
programme.desc: On September 16th, 1981 Sugar Ray Leonard faced Thomas Hearns for the WBA and WBC World welterweight titles at the Caesars Palace in Las Vegas resulting in a win by technical knockout for Leonard and went on to be the 1981 Fight of the year.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Wilfred Benitez
programme.desc: On November 30th, 1979 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Wilfred Benitez for the WBC World Welterweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that went 15 rounds but ended in technical knockout giving the victory to Leonard.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Andre Gorges
programme.desc: On April 14th, 2012 Terence Crawford fought Andre Gorges at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas in a bout that was set for 6 round and lasted 5 with a win by knockout victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Jose Benavidez Jr
programme.desc: On October 13th, 2018, Terence Crawford fought Jose Benavidez Jr for the WBO World Welterweight Title in Omaha, Nebraska. In a dominant performance, Crawford showed out in front of his hometown, delivering a TKO in the final round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Julius Indongo
programme.desc: On August 19th, 2017 Terence Crawford fought Julius Indongo for the IBF, WBA, WBC and WBO World Super Lightweight titles at the Pinnacle Bank Arena in Lincoln the bout ended in the third round by knockout securing the victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Kell Brook
programme.desc: On November 14th, 2020 Terence Crawford battled Kell Brook for the WBO World Welterweight title in The Bubble at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas resulting in a fourth round technical knockout victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Shawn Porter
programme.desc: On November 20th, 2021, Terence Crawford fought Shawn Porter for the WBO World Welterweight Title at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. In a very close fight, Crawford turned it up and put on the pressure late, delivering a TKO in the 10th round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Thomas Dulorme
programme.desc: On April 18th, 2015, Terence Crawford fought Thomas Dulorme for the WBO World Super Lightweight Title in Arlington, Texas. Putting on the pressure and showing his aggressive style, Crawford scored three knockdowns in the sixth round to get the TKO.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Viktor Postol
programme.desc: On July 23rd, 2016, Terence Crawford fought Viktor Postol for the WBO and WBC World Super Lightweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Scoring two knockdowns, Crawford dominated the fight, earning a much deserved unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Yuriorkis Gamboa
programme.desc: On June 28th, 2014, Terence Crawford fought Yuriorkis Gamboa for the WBO Lightweight Title at Century Link Center in Omaha. In Top Rank's 2014 Fight of the Year, Terence Crawford shined in front of his hometown, stopping Gamboa in the ninth round.

programme.title: Thomas Hearns vs Juan Domingo Roldan
programme.desc: On October 29th, 1987 Thomas Hearns faced Juan Domingo Roldan for the vacant WBC World Middleweight title at the Las Vegas Hilton the 12 round bout went only 4 rounds ending with a knockout by Hearns securing the victory.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Attempting to even the odds against the Stunticons, the Autobots create the Aerialbots to join in the battle against Megatron, who plans to use Vector Sigma to turn the Earth into a metal planet like Cybertron!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To stop the Decepticons from drilling into Earth’s core, the Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator to use against them. But when they lose control of the giant, the only hope for survival is for the Autobots and Decepticons to work together!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To stop the Decepticons from drilling into Earth's core, the Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator to use against them. But when they lose control of the giant, the only hope for survival is for the Autobots and Decepticons to work together!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Autobot Tracks is damaged while trying to help authorities investigate a plague of car thefts in New York City. Once he is repaired by his human friend Raoul, the two uncover a Decepticon plan to turn the cars into an unstoppable Decepticon army!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race. While they are racing, Megatron is given the perfect opportunity to use his latest weapon - the Transfixation Ray, a device that locks the Autobots into car mode, unable to change back to robot form.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Insecticons have multiplied into an army of thousands. The huge swarms feed on everything in their path, even blocking out the sun! Desperate for a solution, Cosmos, Bumblebee, and Spike travel to a far-off planet in search of a robotic insecticide.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Insecticons have multiplied into an army of thousands. The huge swarms feed on everything in their path, even blocking out the sun! Desperate for a solution, Cosmos, Bumblebee, and Spike travel to a far-off planet in search of a robotic insecticide.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons are thrown through space to a strange world where they are no larger than an alien child's play toy. Suddenly the smallest household nuisances are the Autobots' biggest threats!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated. Their only chance for survival is an alliance between Smokescreen and a shady alien space captain planning to win big on the Monicus Asteroid, site of the best casino in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated. Their only chance for survival is an alliance between Smokescreen and a shady alien space captain planning to win big on the Monicus Asteroid, site of the best casino in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Thought to be extinct, four female Autobots come out of hiding to raid a Decepticon base on Cybertron for Energon Cubes. When their team leader Aleta-1 is captured, Megatron uses her to force Optimus Prime to surrender himself.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the city's hottest nightclub, "Dancitron" opens up, its patrons mysteriously start aiding the Decepticons. After his break-dancing crew gets run off by the club's security, Raoul gets some backup from his trusted Autobot friends.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist. When Autobot Powerglide embarks on a high-altitude mission to save her, they form a bond that will keep his spirits flying high… even in the middle of a Decepticon fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist. When Autobot Powerglide embarks on a high-altitude mission to save her, they form a bond that will keep his spirits flying high... even in the middle of a Decepticon fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: An S.O.S. seeking help from the Autobots arrives from the desperate people of the planet Traal, who have been forced into slave labor by Deceptitron. Seaspray arrives with the Autobots rescue team, and discovers much more than he was planning on.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. Megatron creates a powerful strike team, but his Stunticons lack sentience and independent thought. This leads the Decepticons deep into the heart of Cybertron to steal Vector Sigma, the computer that brought life to those on the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Attempting to even the odds against the Stunticons, the Autobots create the Aerialbots to join in the battle against Megatron, who plans to use Vector Sigma to turn the Earth into a metal planet like Cybertron!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Aerialbots are thrown back in time to Cybertron's Golden Age. While there, they learn the truth of Megatron's early treachery as well as witness firsthand the creation of Cybertron's greatest hero, Optimus Prime!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Megatron becomes infected with cosmic rust, a metal-consuming plague. When Autobot scientist Perceptor is forced to find a cure for Megatron, the entire Autobot civilization is again put at risk of extinction. But an Autobot invention may save them...

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: After a failed attempt on Megatron's life, Starscream is banished to a deserted island. There he finds the remains of World War II battle vehicles and decides to use them as the basis for his own attack team, the Combaticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: United as “Bruticus,” the Combaticons are virtually unstoppable. They plan to pull the Earth into the Sun to eliminate all of their enemies at once. The only hope is for the Autobots and Decepticons to join forces to take Bruticus down!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Aerialbots Slingshot and Skydive disguise themselves as normal jet fighters to expose a ring of human thieves stealing aircraft. But when they learn that Megatron is behind the scheme, they must combine with the other Aerialbots to convert into Superion!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.desc: From the breaking of The Beast ankle, to the shocking attack in the parking lot, to the championship chase that resulted in thousands of LA Comic Con Fans witnessing the crowning of a new WOW World

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Opportunity is knocking as Las Bandidas: Sylvia Sanchez and Vivian Rivera's dream to become WOW World Tag Team Champions could become a reality due to Sophia Lopez's legal strategies and manipulations. Will they be ready when they get their opportunity?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The contracts are ready to be signed for the main event - a Triple Threat for The WOW World Championship -but not all parties are happy about a last-minute addition to the match. Meanwhile, The Beast makes her in-ring return from her devastating injury.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Princess Aussie is the new WOW World Champion! After last week's shocking conclusion, the drama comes to a boiling point between friends The Fabulous Lana Star and The World's Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Princess Aussie finally gets her championship moment after the WOW World Championship belt is taken back from the thieving Lana Star. But not without a rematch against Penelope Pink - set for The Main Event. Will Aussie's reign end as soon as it's begun?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Beast finally speaks after discovering the identity of her attacker and WOW fans hear how she plans to enact her revenge for the brutal attack. Chainsaw's erratic behavior continues as she takes on Jennifer "Jen Z" Florez.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Vickie Lynn McCoy finally breaks her silence about her actions against The Beast before the two women meet in the ring, while the Mother Truckers: Big Rig Betty and Holly Swag get another chance for comeuppance against Las Bandidas.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Princess Aussie vows to be a new kind of fighting champion as she defends her title against challenger Tormenta. Adriana Gambino makes a case for a WOW World Championship opportunity in her match against Stephy Slays, while BK Rhythm and Gigi Gianni.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Mother Truckers are pleased to offer their services to WOW Owner David McLane as he strives to return order to WOW - by volunteering to handcuff themselves to managers Lana Star and Sophia Lopez in the Main Event Tag Match.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Beast seeks revenge in the worst way with a warning from the Fabulous Lana Star to remember before one embarks on the journey of revenge one should dig two graves. This main event match is too dangerous for WOW to sanction.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonga Twins face the most difficult challenge to date. Chainsaw aims to continue her path of destruction against Stephy Slays - will anyone in the locker room be able to control her? Team Spirit looks to gain both momentum and recruits in their match.

programme.desc: Cattleman Sam Brewster's men stop in Tombstone overnight while driving a herd through Arizona. Brewster's son starts blowing off steam, and Sheriff Hollister's deputy is forced to shoot him. Enraged, Brewster threatens to avenge his son's death.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: After killing a man in self-defense in the town of Galeno, Sheriff Hollister (Pat Conway) finds himself hauled before a kangaroo court for trial on a murder charge, the penalty of which is death. An unexpected ally comes to Hollister's defense.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Raoul de Moreney -- a slick card shark and fortune hunter -- comes to Tombstone in search of quick riches. His vicious greed nettles the editor of the Epitaph and, in a flush of anger, the two men agree to a duel…but de Moreney is a deadly duelist.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Gunslinger Jake Hoyt plots a radical means of rising to power in Tombstone -- by snatching the sheriff's job away from Clay Hollister. To succeed, Hoyt plans to outshine Hollister as a sharpshooter. The result is inevitable: a dramatic showdown.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: While the survivors of an Indian attack dig the victim's grave, they discover a vein of silver. The strike ignites a wrathful dispute between the two prospectors and the dead man's kinfolk over shares of ownership of the new-found fortune.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister is taken prisoner by a trio of fugitives who need him as a guide on their escape route to Mexico. Left with his guns but no bullets, the sheriff searches desperately for a means of escape and must make a last-ditch gamble for survival.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: An enraged Apache bravely kills the white man who murdered his father. Both Sheriff Hollister and the victim's brother pursue the Indian -- with very different goals -- and trap him in a box canyon that the Apache has rigged with dynamite.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Gunman Nate Crandall murders a rancher to steal $20,000. Sheriff Hollister gets to the loot first and locks it in a safe. Determined to get the money, Crandall involves young Jim Edwards in a plot to rob the safe and take the fall for the killing.

programme.title: Professional Poker Tour
programme.desc: The Professional Poker Tour hits beautiful Bay 101 for the third tour stop in this historic season. First quarter action begins like a runaway roller coaster ride and nobody's strapped in.

programme.title: Professional Poker Tour
programme.desc: Professional Poker Tour second quarter action from the Bay 101 Casino turns into "The Battle of the Sexes" with the women running over the table and the men running scared.

programme.title: Professional Poker Tour
programme.desc: It's the ultimate fight for survival as 3rd and 4th quarter action collide in one furious episode at Bay 101 in San Jose. Over one hundred pros have already crashed and burned, and those who remain will do anything to make it to the PPT final table.

programme.title: Professional Poker Tour
programme.desc: The PPT hits Northern California's Bay 101 Casino like a runaway freight train.

programme.title: Professional Poker Tour
programme.desc: Pure aggression is the name of the game as first quarter action kicks off at the Bellagio with the largest turnout in PPT history. "Queen of the WPT" Evelyn Ng is prowling for victims, and takes no prisoners.

programme.title: Professional Poker Tour
programme.desc: The biggest names in poker are back at Bellagio in Las Vegas for intense second quarter action of the biggest tournament in PPT history.

programme.title: Professional Poker Tour
programme.desc: More than 230 players started this tournament on this stop of the Professional Poker Tour at Bellagio. It's now down to around 30 players, and third quarter action is all about survival.

programme.title: Professional Poker Tour
programme.desc: It's Battlefield Bellagio as a record-setting 230 professionals have been bruised, battered, bluffed and broken. 27 remain…including PPT champion Erick Lindgren who is drooling for a second trophy.

programme.title: The Return of Shelby the Swamp Man

programme.title: The Return of Shelby the Swamp Man

programme.title: The Return of Shelby the Swamp Man

programme.desc: Take a look at the men who undertake one of the most dangerous jobs on earth--ice road truckers. In the thick of winter truckers in giant eighteen-wheelers carry equipment and supplies to miners in the Canadian tundra.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: An arctic storm forces a road closure. Alex hauls a 44,000-pound diamond ore crusher across 350-miles of ice to the BHP mine. And brutal -40 degree temperatures start to take their toll on the truckers.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: It's the 18th day of the ice road season and truckers have delivered more than 3000 loads to the diamond mines. The temperatures are dropping, the loads are getting heavier and the ice is just three feet thick.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Atem - more than friends, closer than brothers. Will they stay together, or is it time to say goodbye? It's the final answer, the final duel, and the final time we will see our friends in the rousing conclusion to Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When the #1 ranked duelist and ruthless tycoon, Seto Kaiba, kidnaps Yugi's Grandpa to get the rare Blue-Eyes White Dragon card, Yugi must face Kaiba in the ultimate Duel Monsters showdown!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is forced to face Duel Monsters creator, Maximillion Pegasus, in the mysterious Shadow Realm where all the monsters and magic are real. If Yugi loses, Pegasus claims Grandpa's soul as his prize!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi gives up one of his own Star Chips so Joey can board the boat bound for Duelist Kingdom and duel to save his sister's eyesight. Meanwhile, the cheat Weevil tries to cripple Yugi's deck by tossing his best cards overboard!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus announces that there are many strange secrets that will make his ultimate tournament unlike any they've ever had. Yugi must not only figure the rules out, but master them if he's to survive!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Yugi defeats Weevil's first wave of Duel Monsters, he's shocked to discover that Weevil has one last trick up his sleeve; a ravenous Great Moth that grows in power with every turn!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey finds himself courageously accepting a challenge from veteran duelist, Mai. But when Mai begins to demonstrate an unnerving psychic ability, Joey has to figure out Mai's secret strategy before falling victim to it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The fisherman duelist baits Yugi into a duel on his own sea playing field for a home-field advantage. Can Yugi adapt to these new settings to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi is eliminated from the tournament, KaibaCorp's crooked Board of Directors will transfer control of the company from Kaiba to Pegasus! Kaiba's brother Mokuba challenges Yugi to a duel to protect his brother's company!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi must duel a magical doppelganger of Kaiba, created from the greed and power lust Yugi wiped from Kaiba's soul.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi defeats the Blue Eyes White Dragon, but there are two more waiting in the wings! Will the real Kaiba reach Yugi in time to help beat this impersonator?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey decides to battle Rex Raptor without his friends' help to prove that he is man enough to take care of Serenity on his own.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey duels valiantly, but Rex Raptor has unleashed his secret weapon: the Red-Eyes Black Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's classmate Bakura, possessed by his Millennium Ring's dark powers, traps Yugi and friends in a Shadow Game where they become the cards themselves!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus's hired duelist Panik cheats Mai of all her star chips, and Yugi vows to defeat him and win them back. But when Panik's Castle of Dark Illusions enshrouds his monsters in a black mist, how can Yugi defeat an enemy he cannot see?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Despite his astonishing disadvantage, Yugi boldly provokes Panik - "I'll finish you in three turns." Is Yugi bluffing, or does he have the advantage in this battle of wits?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba descends to the kingdom to face Pegasus. Has Kaiba changed since his battle with Yugi, or is he still the same merciless duelist? A battle between Kaiba's Blue Eyes White Dragon and Joey's Red Eyes Black Dragon holds the answers!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bandit Keith's gang kidnaps Joey to a secret cave with a graveyard playing field. As Yugi and friends search for him, Joey faces Bandit Keith's zombie monsters which become stronger as they return from the grave!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey's last-ditch effort, his lucky Time Wizard card, fails against Bandit Keith's zombie monsters. But as his lucky streak comes to an end, will his improving skills as a duelist and his love for his sister inspire him to victory?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey band together in a team battle against the Paradox Brothers with all the Star Chips and entrance to Pegasus's castle on the line!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Paradox Brothers summon the almighty Gate Guardian, a monster that reflects all attacks! Is Joey helping Yugi in this duel, or is his lack of experience sealing their fate for defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey each unleash their strongest monster, the Summoned Skull, and the Red-Eyes Black Dragon, but their strength pales in comparison to the tremendous power of the Gate Guardian.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In order to earn the right to challenge Pegasus, Kaiba must first beat Yugi and take his Star Chips. The rematch between Yugi and Kaiba is about to begin!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons the Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, the strongest monster in the game fused from three Blue-Eyes White Dragons! Yugi has lost all his powerful Duel Monsters, but a true duelist never gives up!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi begins spinning a strategy to put the Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon to rest, but he must decide whether to claim victory or spare Kaiba his life. Yugi's heart is split in two!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Having lost his star chips to Kaiba and his only opportunity to save Grandpa, Yugi is in a state of shock. Can Tea bring Yugi back to consciousness by defeating Mai for her extra star chips and teach Yugi the heart of the duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends enter the castle to discover Kaiba ready to duel Pegasus with Mokuba's soul hanging in the balance! The power of the Millennium Eye gives Pegasus the ability to read other people's minds.

programme.desc: Tori and Andre try to get Jade to date in order to keep her from getting upset about Beck dating someone else; Robbie tries to remove a butterfly from Cat's ear.
